$comment: Canned result for the bill-photo vision stub (src/lib/onboarding/vision.ts). Stands in for what a real vision model would read off a photographed PG&E bill: the account name, service ID, meter serial, rate schedule, the billing/meter-read cycle code, and the service address. It pre-fills the manual onboarding form for one pump. This service ID is not in any Green Button fixture, so the bill-photo path creates its own pump. TODO: replace the stub with Claude vision via Vercel AI Gateway; this fixture then becomes a test fixture only.
